guide_mdone_td_3: Easily verify which missions the Bot has completed in the past
guide_mdone_td_5: Delete historical records that are no longer needed
guide_mlist_p_1: Displays currently in-progress missions. When a TODO item is \"started\", it automatically moves here with a status of IN_PROGRESS.
guide_mlist_td_10: If a mission needs to be paused, it can be returned to the TODO list
guide_mlist_td_2: Displays the execution status of each mission in real time; automatically updates while the Bot is processing
guide_mlist_td_4: Missions are sorted by URGENT → HIGH → MEDIUM → LOW
guide_mlist_td_6: Shows which Entity is responsible for executing the mission
guide_mlist_td_8: Completed missions are moved to the \"Done\" section
guide_notes_p_1: The Notes feature allows both users and Bots to record reference information. Ideal for storing memos, preference settings, conversation summaries, and more.
guide_notes_td_2: Click \"+ Add\" to create a note with a title, content, and category
